glosses.ja: 下線を引く; 強調する

sentences.target: Je souligne la date en rouge.

translations.fr: Je souligne la date en rouge.
translations.en: I'm underlining the date in red.
translations.de: Ich unterstreiche das Datum in Rot.
translations.zh-Hans: 我用红笔在日期下划线。
translations.yue: 我用紅筆喺日期下面劃底線。
translations.he: אני מסמן קו מתחת לתאריך באדום.
translations.vi: Tôi gạch chân ngày bằng bút đỏ.
translations.ar: أضع خطًا تحت التاريخ باللون الأحمر.
translations.nl: Ik onderstreep de datum in het rood.
translations.hi: मैं तारीख के नीचे लाल रंग से रेखा खींचता हूँ.
translations.id: Saya menggarisbawahi tanggal dengan warna merah.
translations.sv: Jag stryker under datumet med rött.
translations.ja: 日付に赤で下線を引きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive, takes 'la date' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'date'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'souligne'.
Preposition introducing a manner/format complement ('en rouge').
Color adjective; complement of the preposition 'en' indicating the color.

sentences.target: Tu peux souligner cette phrase, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø su.li.ɲe sɛt fʁaz sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux souligner cette phrase, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø su.li.ɲe sɛt fʁaz sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you underline this sentence, please?
translations.ko: 이 문장에 밑줄 좀 그어 주세요.
translations.he: בבקשה, סמן קו מתחת למשפט הזה.
translations.vi: Vui lòng gạch chân câu này.
translations.ar: من فضلك، ضع خطًا تحت هذه الجملة.
translations.hu: Kérlek, húzd alá ezt a mondatot.
translations.hi: कृपया इस वाक्य को रेखांकित करो.
translations.nb: Vær så snill og understrek denne setningen.
translations.sv: Var snäll och stryk under den här meningen.
translations.da: Vær venlig at understrege denne sætning.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja alleviivaa tämä lause.
translations.ja: この文に下線を引いてください。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'peux'.
Modal verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive 'souligner'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peux'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'phrase'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'souligner'.
Elided form of the conjunction 'si' before vowel; introduces the subordinate clause in the politeness formula.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'plaît' within the clause.
2nd person singular clitic pronoun (indirect object); complements 'plaît'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; head of the subordinate clause in the fixed expression 's'il te plaît'.

sentences.target: Elle souligne ses yeux avec un crayon.
sentences.reading: /ɛl su.liɲ se zjø avɛk œ̃ kʁɛ.jɔ̃/

translations.fr: Elle souligne ses yeux avec un crayon.
translations.ipa: /ɛl su.liɲ se zjø avɛk œ̃ kʁɛ.jɔ̃/
translations.en: She underlines her eyes with a pencil.
translations.es: Ella se delinea los ojos con un lápiz.
translations.de: Sie betont ihre Augen mit einem Kajalstift.
translations.it: Si delinea gli occhi con una matita.
translations.ko: 그녀는 눈에 아이라이너 펜슬로 선을 그어요.
translations.pt: Ela delineia os olhos com um lápis.
translations.he: היא מדגישה את העיניים בעיפרון עיניים.
translations.vi: Cô ấy kẻ mắt bằng chì kẻ mắt.
translations.nl: Ze omlijnt haar ogen met een oogpotlood.
translations.hi: वह आईलाइनर पेंसिल से आँखों में लाइन खींचती है.
translations.el: Τονίζει τα μάτια της με μολύβι.
translations.nb: Hun markerer øynene med en øyeblyant.
translations.id: Dia menggarisi matanya dengan pensil eyeliner.
translations.sv: Hon markerar ögonen med en kajalpenna.
translations.ro: Își conturează ochii cu un creion dermatograf.
translations.da: Hun markerer øjnene med en øjenblyant.
translations.ja: 彼女はペンシルでアイラインを引きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of 'souligne'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, governs 'ses yeux' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person; agrees in number with the possessed noun (plural 'yeux').
Common noun, masculine plural (irregular plural of 'œil'); direct object of 'souligne'.
Preposition introducing an instrument complement ('avec un crayon').
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'crayon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: On souligne les idées importantes au tableau.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ su.liɲ le zide ɛ̃pɔʁtɑ̃t o tablo/

translations.fr: On souligne les idées importantes au tableau.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ su.liɲ le zide ɛ̃pɔʁtɑ̃t o tablo/
translations.en: We're underlining the important ideas on the board.
translations.es: Subrayamos las ideas importantes en la pizarra.
translations.de: Wir unterstreichen die wichtigen Ideen an der Tafel.
translations.it: Sottolineiamo le idee importanti alla lavagna.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在白板上把重要的观点划线。
translations.yue: 我哋喺白板上為重要嘅要點劃底線。
translations.ru: Мы подчёркиваем важные идеи на доске.
translations.pt: Sublinhamos as ideias importantes no quadro.
translations.he: אנחנו שמים קו מתחת לרעיונות החשובים על הלוח.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi gạch chân những ý tưởng quan trọng trên bảng.
translations.ar: نحن نضع خطًا تحت الأفكار المهمة على اللوح.
translations.nl: We onderstrepen de belangrijke ideeën op het bord.
translations.uk: Ми підкреслюємо важливі ідеї на дошці.
translations.hu: Aláhúzzuk a fontos ötleteket a táblán.
translations.hi: हम बोर्ड पर महत्वपूर्ण विचारों को रेखांकित करते हैं.
translations.el: Υπογραμμίζουμε τις σημαντικές ιδέες στον πίνακα.
translations.nb: Vi understreker de viktige ideene på tavla.
translations.id: Kami menggarisbawahi ide-ide penting di papan tulis.
translations.sv: Vi stryker under de viktiga idéerna på tavlan.
translations.da: Vi understreger de vigtige idéer på tavlen.
translations.ja: ホワイトボードで重要なアイデアに下線を引きます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular (with 'on'); transitive, takes 'les idées' as direct object.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'idées'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'souligne'.
Adjective, feminine plural; agrees with 'idées'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; marks location ('au tableau').
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.
